meanings.definition: draw from specific cases for more general cases
cater to popular taste to make popular and present to the general public; bring into general or common use
examples: They popularized coffee in Washington State
Relativity Theory was vulgarized by these authors

meanings.definition: become systemic and spread throughout the body
examples: this kind of infection generalizes throughout the immune system

meanings.definition: not biologically differentiated or adapted to a specific function or environment
examples: the hedgehog is a primitive and generalized mammal
